home.heroSubtitle: Canada's most trusted marketplace. Escrow protection, verified sellers, and all transactions in CAD. Built safe by design.
home.safetyDesc: Every transaction is protected. Every seller is verified. Your data stays in Canada.
home.escrowProtectionDesc: Your payment is held securely until you confirm receipt. No risk of losing money.
home.verifiedSellersDesc: Every seller goes through our verification process. Only trusted merchants on our platform.
home.dataInCanadaDesc: All your data is stored and processed in Canada, following PIPEDA and Canadian privacy laws.
home.disputeProtectionDesc: Built-in dispute resolution system. We mediate issues to ensure fair outcomes for both parties.
home.cadOnlyDesc: No currency conversion fees. All transactions are in Canadian dollars.
home.legalComplianceDesc: Fully compliant with Canadian e-commerce laws, tax regulations, and consumer protection.
home.browseByCategoryDesc: Explore thousands of products across every category
home.shopAcrossCanadaDesc: Products and sellers from all 13 provinces and territories
home.findSellersOnMapDesc: Explore our interactive map to discover verified sellers across all 13 Canadian provinces. Search by city, filter by province, and click any marker to visit their storefront instantly.
home.findItDesc: Browse thousands of products from verified Canadian sellers across all 13 provinces.
home.paySafelyDesc: Your payment is held in escrow until you receive and confirm your order.
home.getItDesc: Fast shipping across Canada with tracking provided for every order.
home.confirmDesc: Review and confirm receipt. Release payment only when you are satisfied.
home.lovedByCanadiansDesc: See what our community has to say
home.startSellingTodayDesc: Join thousands of Canadian sellers on our trusted platform. Low fees, fast payouts, and built-in buyer protection.

escrow.heroSubtitle: Every transaction on Canada Marketplace is protected by our secure escrow system. Your payment is held safely until you confirm you're satisfied with your purchase.
escrow.whatIsDesc: Escrow is a financial arrangement where a third party (Canada Marketplace) holds and regulates payment between two parties (buyer and seller) until all conditions of the transaction are met. When you buy a product, your payment goes into our secure trust account. The seller doesn't receive the money until you've received the item, inspected it, and confirmed that you're happy with your purchase. If something goes wrong, we're here to help resolve the issue and ensure you get your money back.
escrow.step1Desc: You place an order and your payment is held securely in our escrow trust account. The seller is notified to ship your item.
escrow.step2Desc: The seller ships your item with tracking provided. You can monitor delivery progress from your Orders page.
escrow.step3Desc: When your package arrives, inspect the item carefully. Make sure it matches the description and is in the expected condition.
escrow.step4Desc: Once you're satisfied, confirm delivery in your Orders page. The payment is released to the seller.
escrow.step5Desc: If something is wrong, you can file a dispute within 14 days. Our team will review and resolve the issue fairly.
escrow.buyerFullRefundDesc: If you don't receive your item or it's not as described, you're entitled to a full refund from the escrow account. Your money is always protected.
escrow.buyerNoReleaseDesc: Payment is never released to the seller until you explicitly confirm that you've received and are satisfied with your purchase. You're always in control.
escrow.buyerDisputeDesc: You have 14 days from delivery to file a dispute if something goes wrong. Our dispute resolution team reviews cases within 48 hours.
escrow.sellerProofDesc: The buyer's payment is confirmed and held in escrow before you ship. You know the funds are real and available — no fake payments or bounced cheques.
escrow.sellerFraudDesc: Since payments are held in escrow and released only after buyer confirmation, you're protected from fraudulent chargeback claims.
escrow.sellerFairDesc: If a buyer files a dispute, our team reviews all evidence objectively. Both parties can provide documentation, and we work to reach a fair resolution.
escrow.faq1Q: What happens if the seller never ships my order?
escrow.faq1A: If the seller doesn't ship within the expected timeframe, you can file a dispute and request a full refund. The funds will be returned to you from the escrow account. Our team will investigate and resolve the issue.
escrow.faq2Q: Can the seller access my payment before I confirm delivery?
escrow.faq2A: No. Payment is held in our secure escrow trust account and is only released after you confirm delivery. The seller never has direct access to your payment until you're satisfied.
escrow.faq3Q: How long do I have to confirm delivery?
escrow.faq3A: You have 14 days from the confirmed delivery date to inspect your item and either confirm delivery or file a dispute. We recommend inspecting items promptly upon receipt.
escrow.faq4Q: What if the item is damaged during shipping?
escrow.faq4A: If your item arrives damaged, take photos immediately and file a dispute within 14 days. Provide photos as evidence and our team will work with you and the seller to reach a fair resolution, typically a full refund.
escrow.ctaDesc: Every purchase on Canada Marketplace is protected by escrow. Shop knowing your money is safe until you're satisfied.

sellerGuide.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about becoming a verified seller on Canada Marketplace. Follow these steps and start selling to Canadians across all 13 provinces and territories.
sellerGuide.step1Desc: Sign up with your email, create a secure password, and provide basic information including your name and phone number.
sellerGuide.step2Desc: During sign-up or from your profile settings, select "Register as Seller" to begin the seller onboarding process.
sellerGuide.step3Desc: Fill in your business name, select your province, and add your phone number. This information builds trust with buyers.
sellerGuide.step4Desc: Upload a government-issued ID (driver's license, passport, or provincial ID). If applicable, provide your business registration documents.
sellerGuide.step5Desc: Customize your store name, add a logo, write a compelling store description, and set your return and shipping policies.
sellerGuide.step6Desc: Add high-quality photos, write a detailed description, set a competitive price, and choose appropriate shipping options.
sellerGuide.step7Desc: Once verified, your store goes live. Start receiving orders, ship promptly, and build positive reviews to grow your business.
sellerGuide.tip1Desc: Include measurements, materials, condition, and any flaws. Buyers appreciate transparency and are more likely to purchase when they know exactly what they're getting.
sellerGuide.tip2Desc: Take multiple photos from different angles in good lighting. Show close-ups of details and any included accessories. Clear photos significantly increase sales.
sellerGuide.tip3Desc: Research similar products on the marketplace. Competitive pricing helps you get your first sales and build momentum. You can adjust prices as you build positive reviews.
sellerGuide.tip4Desc: Buyers often message sellers before purchasing. Fast responses build trust and can convert inquiries into sales. Aim to respond within a few hours.
sellerGuide.tip5Desc: Prompt shipping leads to positive reviews and repeat customers. Use tracking on every shipment so buyers can monitor their delivery.
sellerGuide.tip6Desc: Reviews are your reputation on the marketplace. Provide excellent service, accurate descriptions, and fast shipping to earn 5-star ratings from buyers.
sellerGuide.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Canadian sellers on our trusted platform. Set up your store in minutes and reach buyers across all 13 provinces and territories.
sellerGuide.ctaNote: No credit card required • Free to list • Only pay when you sell

shipping.heroSubtitle: Fast, reliable shipping across all 13 Canadian provinces and territories. Every order includes real-time tracking so you always know where your package is.
shipping.canadaPostDesc: Canada's primary postal service. Reliable delivery to every address in Canada, including rural and remote areas.
shipping.purolatorDesc: Express courier service with fast delivery options. Excellent for time-sensitive shipments across Canada.
shipping.upsDesc: Global shipping giant with strong Canadian infrastructure. Multiple service levels from standard to express.
shipping.fedexDesc: Premium shipping with overnight and express options. Great for high-value items that need extra care.
shipping.costsDesc: Sellers set their own shipping rates, which are clearly displayed at checkout before you complete your purchase. There are no hidden fees — the shipping cost you see is the shipping cost you pay. Some sellers offer free shipping on orders over a certain amount.
shipping.tracking1Desc: Every order includes a tracking number. Monitor your package's journey from the seller's location to your doorstep in real time.
shipping.tracking2Desc: View all tracking information in one place on your Orders page. See the current status, estimated delivery date, and full tracking history.
shipping.tracking3Desc: Receive automatic email updates at each shipping stage: order confirmed, shipped, out for delivery, and delivered.
shipping.tip1Desc: Choose boxes that can withstand handling. Double-wall boxes offer extra protection for heavier or fragile items.
shipping.tip2Desc: Use bubble wrap, packing peanuts, or air pillows for fragile items. Ensure items don't move inside the package during transit.
shipping.tip3Desc: Always include a packing slip with the order number, item description, and your store name. This helps with returns and builds professionalism.
shipping.tip4Desc: Canadian weather can be unpredictable. Use waterproof bags or wrap your items to protect against rain and moisture during transit.
shipping.return1Desc: Each seller sets their own return policy, displayed on their product pages and store profile. Review the policy before purchasing.
shipping.return2Desc: If an item is not as described or arrives damaged, you can file a dispute within 14 days of delivery. Our team will mediate a fair resolution.
shipping.return3Desc: All payments are held in escrow until you confirm satisfaction. If there's an issue, the funds are protected and can be refunded.
shipping.territoriesDesc: Yes, we ship to all Canadian territories! Sellers on our platform can ship to Yukon, Northwest Territories, and Nunavut. Shipping times may be longer for remote locations.
shipping.pickupDesc: Some sellers offer local pickup as a shipping option. This is displayed on the product page and at checkout. Local pickup is a great way to save on shipping costs and get your item faster.
shipping.ctaDesc: Browse thousands of products from verified Canadian sellers with fast, tracked shipping to every province and territory.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about buying, selling, payments, shipping, and account management on Canada Marketplace.
faq.noResults: No questions found matching your search.
faq.q1: How do I create an account?
faq.a1: Creating an account is simple and free. Click "Get Started" or "Sign In" in the top navigation, then select "Create Account." Enter your email, create a password, and fill in your name. You'll receive a verification email — click the link to activate your account. The whole process takes under 2 minutes.
faq.a2: You can find products in several ways: browse our homepage categories, use the search bar to search for specific items, filter by category, price range, or region on the Browse page, or explore the Seller Locator map to find sellers near you. We have thousands of products across 8 categories.
faq.a3: When you place an order, your payment is held in our secure escrow trust account — not sent directly to the seller. The funds are only released after you receive the item and confirm you're satisfied. If there's a problem, you can file a dispute within 14 days and request a full refund from escrow.
faq.q4: What if I receive a damaged item?
faq.a4: If your item arrives damaged, take photos immediately and file a dispute within 14 days of delivery. Go to your Orders page, find the order, and click "File Dispute." Upload the photos as evidence. Our dispute resolution team reviews cases within 48 hours and will work to get you a full refund.
faq.a5: If the seller hasn't shipped your order yet, you can contact them through our messaging system to request a cancellation. Once the item has been shipped, you'll need to wait for delivery and then either confirm the order or file a dispute if you don't want the item.
faq.q6: How do I become a seller?
faq.a6: To become a seller: 1) Create an account, 2) Select "Register as Seller" during sign-up or from your profile, 3) Complete your seller profile with business name and province, 4) Upload a government-issued ID for verification, 5) Set up your storefront, 6) List your first product. Verification typically takes 24-48 hours.
faq.a7: Basic sellers pay an 8% marketplace fee on each sale. Gold sellers (those with 50+ sales, 4.5+ star rating, and 3+ months active) pay only 5%. There are no monthly fees, no listing fees, and no hidden charges. You only pay when you sell — it's completely free to start.
faq.a8: You receive your payout via direct bank transfer to your Canadian bank account within 2 business days after the buyer confirms delivery. You can view all payout history and pending payouts from your Seller Dashboard under the Payouts tab.
faq.q9: How do I list a product?
faq.a9: From your Seller Dashboard, click "Add Product" or go to My Products and click the add button. You'll need to provide: product title, description, price, category, condition, stock quantity, high-quality photos (up to 5), and shipping options. Listings go live immediately for verified sellers.
faq.a10: Gold Seller status is awarded to sellers who maintain a minimum 4.5-star rating, have at least 50 completed sales, and have been active for at least 3 months with zero unresolved disputes. Benefits include reduced 5% fees, priority listing placement, a Gold verified badge, enhanced analytics, and access to promotional tools.
faq.a11: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), debit cards, and bank transfers. All prices and transactions are in Canadian Dollars (CAD). We use PCI DSS compliant payment processing to ensure your financial information is secure.
faq.q12: When does the seller get paid?
faq.a12: Sellers receive payment within 2 business days after the buyer confirms delivery. The payment is released from escrow and transferred directly to the seller's Canadian bank account. This ensures the buyer is satisfied before the seller receives funds.
faq.a13: Yes, all prices on Canada Marketplace are displayed in Canadian Dollars (CAD). There are no currency conversion fees since all transactions are processed in CAD. What you see is what you pay.
faq.a14: Absolutely. We use PCI DSS Level 1 compliant payment processing with 256-bit SSL encryption. Your credit card information is never stored on our servers — it's processed directly by our certified payment provider. We also comply with PIPEDA and Quebec's Law 25 for data protection.
faq.a15: Shipping times vary by distance: Within province: 2-4 business days. Within region: 3-5 business days. Cross-country: 5-8 business days. Remote areas (including territories): 7-14 business days. Every order includes tracking so you can monitor delivery progress.
faq.q16: Do you ship to all provinces?
faq.a16: Yes! We ship to all 13 Canadian provinces and territories: British Columbia, Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba, Ontario, Quebec, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, PEI, Newfoundland & Labrador, Yukon, Northwest Territories, and Nunavut.
faq.a17: Yes, every order includes real-time tracking. You can view tracking information on your Orders page, and you'll receive email notifications at each stage: order confirmed, shipped, out for delivery, and delivered. Tracking is provided at no extra cost.
faq.q18: What if my package is lost?
faq.a18: If your tracking shows no movement for an extended period or the estimated delivery date has passed, first contact the seller through our messaging system. If the issue isn't resolved, file a dispute within 14 days. Our team will investigate and work to get you a full refund from escrow.
faq.q19: How do I reset my password?
faq.a19: Click "Forgot password?" on the sign-in page, enter your email address, and we'll send you a password reset link. The link expires in 1 hour. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or try again. You can also contact support for assistance.
faq.a20: Yes. We are fully PIPEDA compliant and conform to Quebec's Law 25. All data is hosted on Canadian servers and is never transferred outside of Canada. We use 256-bit encryption for data in transit and at rest. Your personal information is never sold to third parties.
faq.a21: All sellers must go through our identity verification process. They upload a government-issued photo ID (driver's license, passport, or provincial ID card) and, if applicable, business registration documents. Our compliance team reviews these within 24-48 hours. Only verified sellers can list products.
faq.a22: If you have an issue with an order, go to your Orders page and click "File Dispute." Select a reason, provide a description, and upload evidence (photos, messages). Our dispute resolution team reviews all evidence from both parties and makes a decision within 48 hours. Funds are held in escrow until the dispute is resolved.
faq.q23: Is the marketplace available in French?
faq.a23: Yes! Canada Marketplace is fully bilingual, supporting both English and French. You can switch languages using the language toggle in the navigation bar (CA EN / CA FR). All product listings, seller communications, support, and legal documents are available in both official languages.
faq.q24: How do I report a suspicious seller?
faq.a24: If you notice suspicious activity from a seller (fraudulent listings, misleading descriptions, or inappropriate behavior), you can: 1) File a dispute if it's related to an order, 2) Contact our support team directly, or 3) Report the listing using the flag option on the product page. We take all reports seriously and investigate promptly.
faq.ctaDesc: Our support team is here to help. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
